name: claude-code-skills
description: Production-ready AI skill packages for every coding assistant — 339 expert skills across 17 domains: engineering, project management, marketing, C-level advisory, regulatory compliance, business growth, legal, product, personal productivity, vertical advisors, data analytics, sales, documents, HR, research, finance, and workflow meta-skills

metadata.description: 339 production-ready AI skill packages across 17 domains, installable per-domain as Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: engineering-advanced-skills
plugins.description: 82 engineering skills: architecture, fullstack, DevOps, security, AI/ML, data engineering, and agent tooling

plugins.name: pm-skills
plugins.description: 66 project management skills: discovery, delivery, career growth, strategy frameworks (BMC/lean/SWOT/Porter's/Ansoff), GTM, and Jira/Linear/Notion/Confluence integration

plugins.name: marketings
plugins.description: 39 marketing skills: content creation, SEO/AEO, demand generation, product marketing, brand strategy, and campaign analytics

plugins.name: c-level-skills
plugins.description: 31 c level advisor skills: CEO/CTO/CFO/CMO/CRO/CPO/COO/CHRO/CISO advisors plus CAIO, CDO, CCO, General Counsel, and VP Engineering

plugins.name: ra-qm-skills
plugins.description: 27 ra qm team skills: ISO 13485, MDR, FDA, SOC 2, GDPR, EU AI Act, NIS2, DORA, NIST CSF, PCI-DSS, CCPA, ISO 42001 plus audit-prep playbooks

plugins.name: business-growth-skills
plugins.description: 20 business growth skills: conversion-rate optimization, pricing, referrals, revenue operations, and commercial strategy (deal desk, channel economics, partnerships)

plugins.name: legal-skills
plugins.description: 17 legal skills: EXPERIMENTAL: contract review, NDA, privacy, DPIA, breach response, risk assessment, and mediation

plugins.name: product-skills
plugins.description: 13 product team skills: product management, RICE/OKRs, UX research, product analytics, Apple HIG, research synthesis, and spec-to-repo

plugins.name: personal-productivity-skills
plugins.description: 10 personal productivity skills: resume, lead research, meeting insights, naming, invoices, email triage, calendar prep, investor updates, pitch decks, and weekly review

plugins.name: vertical-advisor-skills
plugins.description: 7 vertical advisors skills: strategic advisors for fintech, healthtech, edtech, ecommerce, proptech, climate-tech, and marketplace businesses

plugins.name: data-analytics-skills
plugins.description: 5 data analytics skills: data analysis, business intelligence, data science, ML ops, and analytics engineering

plugins.name: sales-success-skills
plugins.description: 5 sales success skills: account executive, sales operations, and solutions architect playbooks

plugins.name: documents-skills
plugins.description: 4 documents skills: docx, pdf, pptx, and xlsx audit toolkits using stdlib-only OOXML parsing

plugins.name: hr-operations-skills
plugins.description: 4 hr operations skills: talent acquisition, people analytics, and HR business partner toolkits

plugins.name: research-skills
plugins.description: 4 research skills: systematic literature review, grant proposals, patent prior-art/landscape, and intelligence dossiers

plugins.name: finance-skills
plugins.description: 3 finance skills: financial analysis with ratio analysis, DCF valuation, budgeting, and forecasting

plugins.name: workflow-skills
plugins.description: 2 workflow skills: meta-skills for routing to the right skill (skill-router) and handing off context between skills (handoff)
